_readme: Measured or assumed game constants the simulator depends on. Every entry carries verified:true only after an in-game practice-mode measurement (record date + method in source). The harness lists unverified fixtures on every run and refuses to stamp any artifact 'Proven' while a constant it used is unverified. See docs/v5-engine-design.md, component A.

mitigation.source: Assumed standard MOBA formula. Measure: practice mode, fixed-damage ability vs known-armor target.

percentPenMultiplicative.source: Patch 1.14 notes: percent armor penetration now multiplicative (predecessorgame.com, May 19 2026).

abilityHaste.source: Assumed LoL-style ability haste. Measure: Timewarp + known-CD ability, stopwatch.

critMultiplier.source: Assumed. Measure: largest_critical_strike vs basic hit on same target, or practice mode.

attackSpeedFormula.source: Assumed. base_stats.attack_speed is per-level attacks/sec (omeda.city heroes.json); item attack_speed treated as percent.

abilityScalingUsesBonusPowerOnly.source: base_stats.physical_power equals the basic-attack per-level damage line, so displayed ratios are read as applying to item-granted power only. Measure: ability damage with 0 vs 1 power item.

ultRankLevels.source: Assumed standard ult rank-up levels. Verify in game.

maxLevel.source: 18-entry base stat arrays across all heroes (omeda.city heroes.json, patch 1.14.4).

checkpoints._note: Minute -> typical level and item gold by role. PLACEHOLDER values, to be replaced by aggregates over gold_earned_at_interval + level from match ingest (field confirmed live, June 11 2026 probe).

referenceProfiles._note: Enemy defense profiles for damage objectives, level-13 ballpark: squishy = mage/carry base armor + no defense items; bruiser = fighter base + one defensive item; tank = warden base + two defensive items + HP. Derived from omeda.city base_stats at level 13.
